name: MP Materials Corp. / DE
summary: PART I Overview MP Materials Corp., including its subsidiaries (the Company, MP Materials, we, our, and us), is the largest producer of rare earth materials in the Western Hemisphere. Headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada, the Company owns and operates the Mountain Pass Rare Earth Mine and Processing Facility (Mountain Pass) located near Mountain Pass, San Bernardino County, California, the only rare earth mining and processing site of scale in North America.
